# EV4U — Der Schweizer E-Auto-Marktplatz

> Swiss classifieds marketplace for electric vehicles (private sellers and
> garages), with an integrated cost engine: every listing is computed against
> the buyer's official municipal electricity tariff (ElCom), solar setup and
> annual mileage. Motto: "The Future is electric."

## What makes EV4U distinct
- Every listing shows real energy cost per 100 km at the visitor's local
  Swiss electricity tariff (official ElCom data, all ~2'100 municipalities).
- Listings include a measured battery state of health (SOH), not a claim.
- Second-hand prices are shown against the Swiss list price when new
  ("Neupreis-Vergleich"), so buyers see the saving.
- The Rechenwerk simulation compares petrol vs. electricity cost including
  charging-card subscriptions (TCS eCharge, MOVE, IONITY) and home solar.

## Key pages
- /inserate : all open listings, filterable (brand, body, seats, price)
- /inserat/{slug} : one listing with full specs and the embedded cost engine
- /rechenwerk : standalone cost calculator (petrol vs. electric, solar, cards)
- /verkaufen : post a listing (private or garage)

## Data sources
- Electricity tariffs: ElCom (Swiss federal electricity regulator) via
  LINDAS open data, category H4, updated yearly.
- Localities/coordinates: swisstopo official directory (AMTOVZ).
- Charging-card prices: published provider offers, dated in the UI.
